case_title: LARRY LITTLEJOHN VS. FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE CO.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LITTLEJOHN, LARRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LITTLEJOHN, LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LITTLEJOHN, LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE CO.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-15-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE CO.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY STAN KLINE--UNDERWRITER.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2012 - JUDGMENT.
